summary: All bug fixes VERIFIED: 1) Contract email fix - 3-second delay before contract email works, Resend ID logged successfully. 2) Auto-generated contract appears after quote acceptance within 8 seconds. 3) Manual contract send returns emailSent field. 4) ContractsTab uses light theme badges and auto-expands newest contract. 5) Portal shows auto-generated contract ready for client signing.
passed_tests: POST /api/leads - Create lead with owner email works (201)
POST /api/leads/:leadId/quotes - Create quote works (201, status DRAFT)
POST /api/quotes/:quoteId/send - Send quote works (200, emailSent: true for owner email)
POST /api/quotes/public/:quoteToken/accept - Quote acceptance triggers auto-contract generation
GET /api/leads/:leadId/contracts - Auto-generated contract found with status SENT
GET /api/portal/:token - Portal returns auto-generated contract with signing UI
POST /api/leads/:leadId/contracts - Create manual contract draft works (201)
POST /api/contracts/:id/send - Manual send returns emailSent: true for owner email
ContractsTab STATUS_STYLES uses light theme colors (bg-light-100, bg-blue-50, bg-green-50, bg-yellow-50)
Backend logs show [AUTOPILOT] and [EMAIL] messages with Resend ID
critical_code_review_comments: autoGenerateContract (quotes.ts lines 121-193) now includes 3-second delay before sending contract email to avoid Resend rate-limit collision
sendContractSentEmail (email.ts) captures and logs Resend email ID (resendData?.id)
ContractsTab STATUS_STYLES uses proper light theme colors for all 4 statuses (DRAFT, SENT, VIEWED, AGREED)
ContractsTab fetchContracts auto-expands first contract when contracts load
All changes are awaited properly - no fire-and-forget issues
seed_data_creation: Test leads, quotes, and contracts created during E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 bugs verified fixed: 1) Contract email now sent after 3-second delay with Resend ID logged. 2) ContractsTab auto-expands newest contract and uses light theme status badges. E2E flow verified: login -> create lead -> create quote -> send quote -> accept quote -> contract auto-generated (8s wait) -> contract visible in portal with signing UI.
